title: The Prophet 's Lesser Pilgrimage from Which the Polytheists Turned Him Back: The Story of al-Hudaybiyah
description: Polytheists Turned Him Back: The Story of alHudaybiyah271 According to Ibn Humayd-al-IIakam b. Bashir272-'Umar b. Dharr al-Hamdalu-273-Mujahid:274 The Prophet made three lesser pilgrimages, all of them in [the month of] Dhu al -Qa'dah, returning from each of them to Medina. According to Ibn Humayd-Salamah -Ibn Ishaq, who said: The Prophet set out to make the lesser pilgrimage in Dhu al-Qa'dah, (1529] not intending to make war. He had called on the Arabs and Bedouin desert dwellers who were around him to help by setting out 268.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
